steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery
Reach KPI added to the report document.

steps.expression: (() => { const group = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__measure-pill-group')).find((node) => ((node.innerText || node.textContent || '').includes('Available Impressions'))); const toggle = group?.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__selector-box'); if (!toggle) { throw new Error('Available Impressions toggle not found.'); } toggle.click(); })()

steps.text: Reach KPI references unavailable KPI value field 'avails'.

steps.expression: (() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); const text = root?.innerText || root?.textContent || ''; return text.includes("Reach KPI references unavailable KPI value field 'avails'."); })()

steps.text: Saved exploration artifact: Report Builder Demo
Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice')).some((node) => { const text = ((node.innerText || node.textContent || '')).toLowerCase(); return text.includes('saved report payload:') && text.includes('invalid'); })

steps.text: Resolve authored block validation issues before preparing writable ReportDocument payloads.

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => ((node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim() === 'Prepare create payload')); return !!button && button.disabled === true; })()

(() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => ((node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim() === 'Prepare update payload')); return !!button && button.disabled === true; })()
